prompt: Trigger an outbound Webhook to the Human Engineering Team when a task is permanently destroyed via Discard Bin.
agent_thoughts: Deploying a dedicated Alerter daemon that specifically listens to the Discard Bin topic for terminal payloads.
plan: Poison pill hits Max Retries. DLQ drops to Discard Bin. Alerter picks it up and prints PagerDuty alert.
patch: Alert fired. Engineering notified of dropped workload from Agent 1.
reason: Complete observability loop established. 'Silent' failures no longer exist.
